Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Deem Maters Admitted
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. RULING: The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S Motion for Order to Deem Maters Admitted is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. Judge Pro Tem: David R. McDonald; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
